name: RuntimeDocumentDataTable
summary: Collection of document runtime data. This is a good place to put non-serialized, per document data.

methods.name: GetValue<T>
methods.signature: public T GetValue<T>(Object key, Func<RhinoDoc, T> newT) where T : class
methods.summary: Checks the dictionary for the specified key, if found and the value is not null then the value is returned. If the key is not found or its value is null then newT(Document) is called to create a new value instance which is put in the dictionary and returned.

params.name: newT
params.doc: Function called to create new value

returns.doc: Returns the document specific instance of type T using the specified dictionary key.

methods.name: TryGetValue<T>(Object)
methods.signature: public T TryGetValue<T>(Object key) where T : class
methods.summary: Check dictionary for value and return it properly cast if found.

returns.doc: Returns the document specific instance of type T using the specified dictionary key or null if not found.
